title: Packaging for smoking substitute consumables
abstract: The present disclosure provides a packaging for a plurality of aerosol-forming articles, the packaging comprising: a base and an opposing lid spaced by one or more walls so as to define a cavity for the aerosol-forming articles; and an internal liner, the liner lining at least a portion of the one or more walls. The packaging comprises a first flavourant source provided on the liner and a second flavourant source provided on pad disposed on an internal surface of the packaging.
claims: Claims Claims: 1. Packaging for a plurality of aerosol-forming articles, the packaging comprising: a base and an opposing lid spaced by one or more walls so as to define a cavity for the aerosol-forming articles; and an internal liner, the liner lining at least a portion of the one or more walls, wherein the packaging comprises a first flavourant source provided on the liner and a second flavourant source provided on pad disposed on an internal surface of the packaging. 2. Packaging according to claim 1 wherein the internal liner lines the base, lid and one or more walls so as to enclose the aerosol-forming articles when received therein. 3. Packaging according to claim 1 or 2 wherein the pad is disposed on an internal surface of the lid or the base. 4. Packaging according to claim 2 wherein the pad is disposed on an internal surface of the liner. 5. Packaging according to claim 4 wherein the pad is disposed on an internal surface of the liner that lines the lid or base. 6. Packaging according to any one of the preceding claims wherein the flavourant is coated, sprayed or painted onto the internal liner and/or the pad. 7. Packaging according to any one of the preceding claims wherein both the first and second flavourant sources comprise menthol. 8. An aerosol-forming article package comprising: a base and an opposing lid spaced by one or more walls so as to define a cavity containing a plurality of aerosol-forming articles, each article comprising an outer wrapping layer comprising a flavourant; an internal liner comprising a flavourant and lining at least a portion of the one or more walls. 9. A package according to claim 8 wherein each aerosol-forming article comprises an aerosol-forming substrate and a terminal filter element downstream of the aerosol-forming substrate. 10. A package according to claim 9 wherein the outer wrapper of each aerosol-forming article comprises a wrapping layer at least partly circumscribing the aerosol-forming substrate, the wrapping layer comprising the flavourant. 1 1 . A package according to claim 9 or 10 wherein the outer wrapper of each aerosol-forming article comprises a tipping layer at least partly circumscribing the terminal filter of the aerosol-forming article, the tipping layer comprising the flavourant. 12. A package according to claim 1 1 wherein the flavourant is applied to an outer surface of the tipping layer of each aerosol-forming article. 13. A package according to any one of claims 8 to 12 wherein the flavourant is coated, sprayed or painted onto the outer wrapper of each aerosol-forming article. 14. A package according to any one claim 8 to 13 wherein each aerosol-forming article is a heat-not-burn (HNB) consumable. 15. A method of flavouring an aerosol-forming article, the method comprising: providing a packaging according to any one of claims 1 to 7; and sealing an unflavoured aerosol-forming article within the packaging for a period of time such that the aerosol-forming article acquires the flavour of the first and/or second flavourant source.
